name: Sun Outdoors Rehoboth Bay

previousNames.name: Massey's Landing
previousNames.notes: Name when we visited in 2024 and 2025.

summary_text: A lively waterfront RV resort on Rehoboth Bay with full-hookup sites, private beach access, pools, a swim-up bar, kayaking, paddleboarding, and easy access to Delaware's coastal towns.

amenities.campStore: Camp Store with Coffee and Ice Cream Shop
amenities.swimmingPool: Family Pool and Adult-Only Area with Swim-Up Bar

siteFeatures.level: Mostly level RV sites with waterfront and interior options.
otherNotes: Waterfront sites offer beautiful views of Rehoboth Bay.
The resort can feel crowded during busy weekends and organized events.
Golf carts are common throughout the property.
This is a social, activity-focused resort rather than a quiet campground.
We stayed during a Grand Design owners rally.

starlink.notes: Open waterfront and interior sites may provide good reception, while trees and neighboring RVs can create obstructions.

activities.biking: Campground Roads and Nearby Coastal Trails

petNotes.walkingAreas: Campground roads and waterfront areas provide several options for leashed dog walks.
petNotes.dogPark: A fenced dog park is available.
petNotes.dogFriendlyTrails: Leashed pets can use campground walking areas and permitted nearby coastal trails.
petNotes.petRestrictions: Pets must remain leashed outside the dog park. Beach access rules vary by location and season.
petNotes.hazards: Watch for heat, hot pavement, ticks, mosquitoes and sharp shells near the shoreline.
petNotes.notes: The dog park and waterfront walking areas make this a convenient resort for traveling with pets.

tripTips: Reserve a waterfront site if possible—the bay views and sunsets are a major part of the experience.
This resort is best for travelers who enjoy pools, activities, golf carts and a social atmosphere.
The adult-only pool area and swim-up bar are great places to relax.
Bring kayaks or paddleboards to take advantage of direct access to Rehoboth Bay.
Expect the resort to feel crowded during rallies, holidays and peak summer weekends.
Check seasonal beach rules before bringing pets to nearby coastal areas.
